compiled_state.title: Decide + delete or adopt: jira-credential-helper.sh (+ test)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Plugin-era interactive credential-onboarding helper. Only its test references it; no dispatcher arm, no doc. RECOMMEND delete + tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh; alternative: expose via a dispatcher arm/doc as a credentials preflight.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Decision recorded; files deleted OR adopted (reachable + documented)
- [ ] Full suite green

comments.body: DECISION RECORDED (2026-06-09, audit owner direction: clean break from dso): EXECUTE THE DELETE PATH. Delete src/rebar/_engine/jira-credential-helper.sh and tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh in one commit; full suite green. Adopt path is context only — do NOT adopt without new owner sign-off recorded here. Release-notes line: 'Removed unreachable dso-era interactive Jira credential helper.'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: DECISION (per maintainer): KEEP as reference, not delete. Maintainer intends to implement Jira onboarding & configuration; this plugin-era credential-detection helper is the groundwork. Relocated jira-credential-helper.sh + its test out of src/rebar/_engine and tests/ into scripts/jira-onboarding-reference/ (outside the wheel's packages=[src/rebar] and outside pytest testpaths), relabeled header as REFERENCE/GROUNDWORK, repointed the test at the co-located helper (10/10 pass), and added a README. Follow-up feature story vein-acid-navy created and linked discovered_from this ticket.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
